inline_comments.message:
This is the same method that was created in the prior review. This may be a recurring pattern as you resolve the Sonar items.

Since this test was written, we have added some useful utilities in helpers.py, utils/*, and structure.py

Rather than repeat the definition of the same method, I would recommend re-writing methods written in this method to use structures.py's Heat class.

Example:

heat = Heat(yaml_file)
for r_id, props in heat.nova_server_resources:
    # then the logic of the check

This will simplify the overall method and address the Sonar fix without duplicating any code.
